hypothesis: Post-migration smoke URL update: replace reyco.glvmarketing.ca staging URLs with reycomarine.com production URLs across all 6 smoke URL slots. Production domain is reycomarine.com (migrated 2026-05-06). Staging domain reyco.glvmarketing.ca still serves 200 on homepage but /products/ and /services/ return 404 even on staging — meaning the old smoke gate was partially broken for 4 of 6 URLs. New 6-URL set verified 200 on 2026-05-11: homepage, boats-and-marine catalog, service listing, single product (mercury 60 ELPT), service detail (engine-repair), brand/category archive (outboard-motors). Template coverage maintained: homepage, catalog, service listing, single-product.php, service-detail.php, category archive.
measurement: Percentage of deploys where CI smoke test passes on first push (track via git log + CI run history). Secondary: zero false-positive blocks from the new production URLs (no unexpected redirects, auth walls, or server errors).
changes_description: Updated SMOKE_URLS in step 3 from reyco.glvmarketing.ca (staging, partially broken: /products/ and /services/ 404) to reycomarine.com (production). New URL set: / (homepage), /boats-and-marine/ (catalog), /service/ (services listing), /product/2022-mercury-me-60-elpt-4s-efi/ (single product), /service/engine-repair/ (service detail), /boats-and-marine/outboard-motors/ (brand/category archive). All 6 verified 200 on 2026-05-11T10:53Z. Window closes 2026-05-13T10:57Z.
